task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for Volkswagen Golf GTI (Vehicle). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $32445.00 and wholesale is $24424.00. Product features: Hot hatchback with 2.0L turbocharged engine and sporty handling. Reference: https://www.vw.com/en/models/golf-gti.html

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for Volkswagen Golf GTI. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying Volkswagen Golf GTI. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
